1
6 10 3 100 50000000 0.000001
7 14 3 101 50000000 0.000001
8 18 3 102 50000000 0.000001
9 11 3 103 50000000 0.000001
6 10 3 100 200000 2.011
6 10 3 101 180000 2.011
3 4 3 100 200000000 2.0
6 7 3 100 200000000 2
6 7 3 101 200000000 2

First line: # of flows
src0 dst0 3 dst_port0 size0 start_time0
src1 dst1 3 dst_port1 size1 start_time1
...

Please order the flows in ascending start_time!
